subcodes.first_line: O my Lord! I beseech Thee, by the beauty of Thy oneness, the sovereignty of Thy Lordship, and the dominion of Thy Divinity, to assist this servant of Thine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رب اسئلک بجمال احدیتک و سلطان ربوبیتک و ملیک الوهیتک ان توید عبدک هذا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @love of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
